title: docs_analysis_artifact
description: Analysis artifact produced by the docs-review story's oracle.task call in the refining_decision room. Provides deeper context and consolidation on the stale_docs entries from the verdict.

analysis_markdown.description: Markdown-formatted analysis of the invalidation patterns. May include consolidations, priority tiers, or grouped insights.

complete.description: Whether the analysis was able to complete successfully (true) or encountered blockers (false).

consolidated_groups.description: Optional: logical groupings or consolidations of the stale_docs entries, e.g. by affected feature or component.
